dialogue:
[A] I need a train going to Cambridge that will depart after 10:15 from broxbourne.
[B] I have train TR5678 that would suit you.
[A] Could you just tell me when that one departs?
[B] Train TR5678 departs Broxbourne at 10:32 and arrives at Cambridge at 11:32.
[A] Great can you get me a booking for 3 people?
[B] Booked! Your reference number is: XZU4Z1RR . Can I help with anything else?
[A] Thank you. Yes. I am also looking for an international restaurant.
[B] There are three. Two located in the centre that are moderate in price and one in the east that is cheap.
[A] I want the one in the east, please book me a table for 3 people.
[B] Certainly. Can you please tell me for what day you would like for me to make this reservation?
[A] can you book it for sunday afternoon?
[B] What time exactly would you like to dine?
[A] Actually, I'd like a moderately priced international restaurant in the centre. I need the postcode and address please. Sorry, I keep changing my request!
[B] No problem. How about The Varsity Restaurant located at 35 Saint Andrews Street City Centre with phone number 01223356060? There is also Bloomsbury Restaurant if you prefer.
[A] The Varsity is good. Can I get the postcode please?
[B] The post code is cb23ar. Shall I book it ?
[A] Yes, please make the booking and email me the reference number.
[B] How many people will the reservation be for?
[A] I do not need a reservation for the restaurnt just information.
[B] Ok. Do you need anything else then?
[A] No that will be all thank you so much for all your help.
[B] Okay, thanks for all of your questions. I'm glad I was able to help you today. Goodbye. I hope I helped with the reservations.

[A] It's Sunday and I am bored. Do you have any trains into Cambridge today?
[B] There are many trains, when would you like to depart?
[A] I would like to leave from Kings Lynn after 9:30.
[B] TR5928 leaves at 10:11, would you like me to book that for you?
[A] Can you give me the price of a ticket?
[B] Tickets are 7.84 pounds. Can I book that for you?
[A] Great I also need to find a place to stay that doesn't need to have free parking and is in the cheap price range.
[B] There are 33 hotels in the cheap range, any preference on area or anything else?
[A] Cheap price range in the centre.
[B] There are two choices. Alexander Bed and Breakfast and El Shaddai. Do you want to make a reservation at one of these choices?
[A] I will take Alexander please.
[B] To confirm you want me to book you a room at Alexander Bed and Breakfast starting on Sunday. How many nights will you be staying?
[A] Yes. Please book it for 2 people for 2 nights on Sunday.
[B] I'm sorry, Alexander Bed and Breakfast is unavailable for those nights. Would you like to try another day or just one night instead?
[A] Actually, let's back up. I need a place with a star rating of 0, in the centre, with free parking. Does the Alexander have 0 stars?
[B] I have the El Shaddai that is cheap and located in the centre. They have a 0 star rating and offer free parking and free wifi. Would that work for you?
[A] Yes, that would work for me. Please book it for 2 people for 2 nights starting sunday.
[B] I'm sorry i was unable to book your table for 2 people for 2 days on sunday. Would you like another day?
[A] How about trying just for one night, instead?
[B] Booking was successful for 1 night only. Reference number is : O1RX0UHA . Can I be of anything further assistance?
[A] No, that will be all. Thank you for all of your help!
[B] have a nice day, good bye.

[A] I am looking for places to go in town I prefer a college.
[B] How about Magdalene College? They're in the west side, and they have no entrance fee.
[A] That sounds perfect. What is their address?
[B] Their postcode is cb30ag an the entrance is free.
[A] Okay what's their address?
[B] The address is magdalene street. Would you like the phone number also?
[A] No on the phone number. I now need help finding a cheap restaurant in the centre of the town.
[B] There are many restaurants, do you know what sort of food you're looking for?
[A] I have no preference on type of food.
[B] Would you like dojo noodle bar?
[A] Sure. Can I get the phone number?
[B] Yes, their phone number is 01223363471. Would you like me to book a table for you?
[A] No, I was just curious. I am also looking for a taxi between those two places.
[B] I would be happy to help with that. Which is your departure site, and what time would you like the car?
[A] I would like to go from the Dojo Noodle Bar to Magdalene College. I want to leave the restaurant by 12:15.
[B] I've booked a car to take you from Dojo to Magdalene College. The vehicle is a white Honda, the contact number is 07882764497. Do you require anything else?
[A] No that was it. Thanks for your help.
[B] We hope to help you again.

[A] I'm looking for some hungarian food restaurants near the centre, please.
[B] I am sorry there are no Hungarian Restaurants near centre.
[A] What kind of expensive restaurants are in the center of town?
[B] Unfortunately there aren't any Hungarian places. Do you want to try other cuisine types?
[A] yes let me see the options
[B] There is a variety of choices; Chinese, African, British, Italian, American, Gastro Pub, etc... Do you have a preference?
[A] i want indian food.
[B] Curry Garden is a nice place would you like that info ?
[A] Yes can I get a address and phone number please?
[B] Certainly, the phone number for the Curry Garden restaurant is 01223302330 and the address is 106 Regent Street City Centre. May I help you with anything else today?
[A] Yes I am also looking for a place in the same area as the restaurant with free parking.I want it for 3 people for 5 nights starting Tuesday.
[B] Would you like something cheap, moderate, or expensive?
[A] That doesn't matter just a hotel in the same area with free parking.
[B] There are two options here. Both are expensive. I recommend gonville hotel.
[A] That would be great. Can you book it on Tuesday for 3 people and 5 nights.
[B] Booking was successful, and your reference number is O4HVZDCW . Is there anything else I can assist you with?
[A] Perfect, thank you for all your help. That is all for now.
[B] Thank you for using our services.

[A] Hi, I am planning a trip and need some recommendations for a place to stay while I am there.
[B] Can I get an area you would like to stay in?
[A] In Cambridge,I need a cheap guesthouse please
[B] There are 9 cheap guesthouses. Is there a particular part of Cambridge you would like to stay in?
[A] I don't really care. I do want a guesthouse with free WiFi, though.
[B] How about the allenbell guesthouse located in the east. It is a cheap hotel with 4 star rating and free wifi and parking.
[A] Is there one in the moderate price range with free internet?
[B] Yes, there is. How many stars should the hotel be rated for?
[A] Star rating does not matter to me.
[B] Avalon is a moderate price guesthouse on the north side of town. Would you like me to book a room for you?
[A] I don't need to book yet, but I would like the address.
[B] the address is 62 gilbert road
[A] Could I also get the phone number?
[B] phone number to avalon guesthouse -01223353071
[A] great, thank you. I would also like a place to go in the west
[B] What kind of place would you like to go to? There are some colleges, some entertainment places, and some museums in the area.
[A] Entertainment sounds great. Can you recommend something?
[B] How about Whale of a Time? It's a great place to take children.
[A] Actually, I'd like to go to a multiple sports attraction in the west if there is one?
[B] I cannot find any multiple sports attractions in the west. Is there another area I can check?
[A] Can you try entertainment in the same area please?
[B] What price range would you like?
[A] Moderate to cheap.
[B] As I mentioned earlier, Whale of a Time is an entertainment attraction in the west. Would you like additional information? I don't have any information on the entrance fee.
[A] I do need the address.
[B] The address is unit 8, viking way, bar hill postcode cb238el.
[A] Thank you. That is all I need.
[B] Have a nice day.

[A] I'm looking for an Indian restaurant, preferably in the centre of town.
[B] There are a number of options for Indian restaurants in the centre of town. What price range would you like?
[A] I would prefer cheap restaurants.
[B] I was able to find three options in your price range, may I recommend The Gandhi?
[A] Sure please book a table there fore 7 people at 12:15 on saturday
[B] I was able to book that for you. They will be reserve your table for 15 minutes. Your reference number is 6EQ61SD9 . Is there anything more I can help with?
[A] No that's all I needed. Thank you!
[B] Thank you for calling, enjoy!

[A] Looking for places to go in town that are theatres.
[B] We have five theatres to choose from, is there a preferred area?
[A] No, I have no preference, which one do you recommend?
[B] The cambridge arts theatre is a good choice.
[A] that sounds good. What area is it in?
[B] It is in the centre at 6 Saint Edward's Passage.
[A] I also need the postcode, if you will.
[B] Sure, the postcode is cb23pj. What else can I do for you today?
[A] I need a train as well.
[B] I can help you with that, where will you be traveling from and to, and what day and time would you like to travel?
[A] I will be leaving from Leicester going to Cambridge on Saturday.
[B] There are a lot of choices on that day. Is there a particular time you are looking for?
[A] I would like it to arrive by 10:15 please
[B] I have four trains for you, depending on how early you want to leave. Do you have a depart time?
[A] Just the one closest to 10:15 is fine.
[B] TR2969 arrives at 09:54 after a 105 minute trip. How many tickets would you like?
[A] I don't want to book right now but can I get the ticket price and departure time on TR2969?
[B] The cost of the train ticket arriving in Cambridge at 09:54 on Saturday would be 30.24 pounds. Is there anything else I may assist you with?
[A] Yes, can you just tell me how long the trip will be?
[B] The duration of that trip is 105 minutes.
[A] What is the train departure time?
[B] It leaves at 08:09. Do you have any other questions for me?
[A] No that is all the information I need. Goodbye
[B] Okay, have a great day!

[A] I would like to see some general information for king's college please.
[B] King's College is a college and is located in the centre of town. There is no entrance fee.
[A] Could you please send me the phone number?
[B] Their phone number is 01223331100. Is there anything else I can do for you?
[A] I am also looking for an expensive restaurant in the centre.
[B] Sure, I can help you with that. Are you in the mood for a certain type of food?
[A] Yes something creative and unusual.
[B] I did not find any creative restaurants. Give me a moment and I will search for unusual ones.
[A] Thank you.
[B] Well, I hesitate to call it unusual, but perhaps you haven't had Turkish cuisine before? The Meze Bar Restaurant is delicious.
[A] If you aren't able to find creative food, how about an indian one instead?
[B] There are 6 indian restaurants located in the centre area. Would you like more information on one? I've heard the golden curry is good.
[A] Please book Golden Curry for 2
[B] What day and time would you like to book your reservation?
[A] I actually need the reservation for 7 people please, at 14:15 on Tuesday.
[B] Sorry that is not available, perhaps at another time?
[A] how about for 13:15?
[B] I was able to book your table. Your reference number is AU4BERTG . Anything else?
[A] I think that's everything. Thank you.
[B] Thank you for using the Cambridge TownInfo centre. Goodbye!

[A] Hi. I am having trouble finding a place to eat called prezzo. Can you locate it for me and tell me a little about it please?
[B] Prezzo is located at 21 - 24 Northampton Road, in the west. It's an italian restaurant. Moderate price range.
[A] That sounds perfect!
[B] Would you like me to book you a table?
[A] Not this time but I would like to visit an attraction while in Centre, can you find one for me?
[B] Okay, there's about 44 attractions in the centre of town. Is there something in particular you'd like?
[A] no, but I will need the address.
[B] I think you would enjoy Old Schools in the centre of town. It is an architectural attraction. The address is trinity lane.
[A] Great, that sounds perfect. Thanks!
[B] Post code is cb21tt, Trinity lane. Is there anything else I can tell you?
[A] Not today , thank you so much for your help. I appreciate everything you do.
[B] Absolutely positively no problem at all! Thanks for using our service. Enjoy your time!
[A] Thanks, I'm all set here. You can end the conversation now.
[B] Thank you! Goodbye.

[A] Hi I am hoping to find a place that is expensive I can stay at, and also has free wifi.
[B] University Arms Hotel near centre is a 4 star with internet on Regent Street. Phone is 01223351241.
[A] Can you find me one with a 3 star rating?
[B] The Gonville Hotel is in the center. The have free internet and parking. their number is 01223366611.
[A] I'd like to book this for 2 people, 3 nights starting on Tuesday please.
[B] Ok I was able to get this for you. Reference number is 2RAB8AMP . Are you looking for places to go as well? I can help with that too.
[A] Yes can you please assist with entertainment?
[B] What type of attraction?
[A] I apologize, I wasn't paying attention to what I wanted. Can you help me find a modern eclectic restaurant in the centre?
[B] Unfortunately, I don't have any modern eclectic restaurants in the city. Is there another type of restaurant I can look for?
[A] Hmm, is there none at all? Eclectic food?
[B] No, I'm sorry. Want to try a different food type?
[A] mediterranean, please.
[B] There are 3 places. Two are expensive and one is cheap. Which do you prefer?
[A] I need something in the same price range as the hotel.
[B] La mimosa is in the expensive price range.
[A] What is the phone number?
[B] Their phone number is 01223362525
[A] I also need the postcode.
[B] Sure! Their postcode is CB58AQ.
[A] Could I book a taxi from the restaurant to the hotel please?
[B] Yes, I can do that. What time would you like to leave?
[A] I would like to leave by 16:45.
[B] Booking completed! It will be a grey Tesla, contact number is 07315091381
[A] Great, that's all I needed! Thanks! Bye!
[B] Yeah, no problem. I am glad I could assist.

[A] I want to find a European restaurant in the west.
[B] There is one available, the cambridge lodge restaurant, would you like me to book you?
[A] No, I'm just getting some information together. Is it expensive?
[B] Yes it is an expensive restaurant, do you want to try a different restaurant?
[A] Let's go with Cambridge Lodge. I'd like to book for 8 at 17:30 on Saturday, please.
[B] Reference number is : IPXE2SID . Is there anything else?
[A] actually, i want to change the reservation to sunday.
[B] Reference number is : ISJVY1RC . Is there anything else?
[A] I am also looking for a hotel, it can be expensive, but it needs to have free wifi.
[B] There are five expensive hotels, all with wifi. Could you tell me which location you are wanting to stay in, to narrow it down?
[A] The area doesn't matter, which one would you recommend?
[B] Sure, I would recommend the Huntingdon Marriott Hotel which is located near the restaurant. Would you like a reservation?
[A] No thanks, just tell me the phone number and type for it please
[B] It is a hotel and the phone number is 01480446000.
[A] How many stars does this hotel have?
[B] It is a 4 star hotel.
[A] I need a taxi to go between the two places, I need a contact number and car type please.
[B] I'd be happy to help with your request. First I'll need to know where you're departing from and what time you'll need picked up?
[A] I need the taxi to pick me up at the hotel and take me to the restaurant by 17:30.
[B] Your all set a yellow audi will be picking you up the contact number is 07509141470, is there anything else you'll be needing today?
[A] No, that was all I needed, thank you so much!
[B] We are happy to help. Come back soon.

[A] Hello, I'm trying to find a train that leaves from Cambridge and arrives here by 13:45 today. Can you help me book a ticket?
[B] The closest arrival time I can give you is 11:51, is that ok? And how many tickets would you like?
[A] That's fine. I don't want to book yet. Is the train you found going to Ely and leaving on Wednesday?
[B] Yes i have a train that leaves on that day but that arrives around 12:07
[A] Could I have the departure time for that particular train please?
[B] That'll be at 11:50.
[A] Thank you very much.
[B] Is there anything else I can help you with? I can help with booking tickets if you would like.
[A] Are there any restaurants that serve cantonese food in the east part of town?
[B] Unfortunately, there are no cantonese restaurants on the east side. Would you like to try a different type of restaurant or area?
[A] Try anything with Indian food, that would work as well. I will need the address if you find one, thanks!
[B] I have found 4 indian restaurants on the east side. There are two moderate and two expensive. Did you have a price range in mind?
[A] No nothing in particular, could you tell me the address of the first one listed?
[B] I would recommend curry prince. The address is 451 Newmarket Road Fen Ditton. Would you like me to book a reservation for you?
[A] No, that is all I needed, thank you.
[B] I hope you have a great day.

[A] I'm looking for a restaurant that serves vietnamese food on the south side of town, is there anything like that?
[B] There are no Vietnamese restaurants on the south side but there is one on the west side. Would that suffice?
[A] What about on the east side? I would like for it to be expensive.
[B] I'm sorry but there are not any Vietnamese restaurants on the East side of town, either.
[A] Bummer, how about Indian food on the east side? I'm willing to pay for an expensive meal, if it's good!
[B] There are 4 Indian restaurant on the East side ranging from moderately priced to expensive. Do you have a price preference?
[A] Expensive would be fine. Can I have the address for the most expensive Indian restaurant out of the four?
[B] How about the Pipasha Restaurant? It is in the expensive price range and serves Indian food. Their address is Newmarket Road Fen Ditton.
[A] I would also like to check on museums on the east side. Can you see what you have in that area?
[B] I have found four museums. 3 of them are free and one costs 5 pounds. Can I get you more information on any of them?
[A] I need information on all of them please.
[B] What information would you like? The phone number, address, or postcode?
[A] the address please
[B] I can give you the address for only one, is there one in particular you wish to learn more about?
[A] Give me information on the one closest to Pipasha Restaurant.
[B] They are all in the same general area, but Cambridge Artworks is nice. It is located at 5 Greens Road, cb13ef. You can call them at 01223902168.
[A] Cool! Is that one of the free ones? Gotta save my money for the grub, you know.
[B] Cambridge artworks is free.
[A] Perfect! Thank you so much for your help!
[B] Anything else I can do for you?

[A] I am looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the moderate price range and should be in the east
[B] Try curry prince or pizza hut fen ditton
[A] The restaurant should serve italian food.
[B] Pizza hut fen ditton serves italian food in the east, would you like a reservation?
[A] What other restaurants in that area serve Italian food?
[B] Pizza hut fen ditton is the only Italian restaurant, in the east, in the moderate price range. Do you want me to try other areas?
[A] No, that will do. Can I book a table for monday?
[B] Absolutely, how many people will you have and what time are you wanting the reservation?
[A] I will have 5 people and we would like 12:15 if possible. Thanks.
[B] You are booked, the reference number is AF2GJ7G6, may I assist with anything else?
[A] Thanks for you help. I only need the restaurant reservation. Goodbye.
[B] You're welcome. Thank you for contacting Cambridge TownInfo centre, and have a great day.

[A] I'm looking for a place to dine on the south side of town. Please find a place that's in the expensive price range.
[B] I found five expensive restaurants on the south side of town. Would you prefer Chinese, Indian, Italian or Mexican?
[A] Do you have a favorite you could recommend? I will need the phone and postcode and food type also please.
[B] If you ask me, the Chiquito Restaurant Bar serves the best Mexican food around. Their postcode is cb17dy. You can reach them at 01223400170. Can I help with anything else?
[A] No, that will be it. Thank you for your help.
[B] Thank you. Have a nice day.

[A] I am looking for information. Can you help me find a place to stay? I want a hotel, not a guestroom.
[B] What area and/or price range would you like? If neither of those matter, I recommend the Gonville, in the center of town.
[A] Moderate would be a perfect price range.
[B] Do you have any other criteria?
[A] Yes, a 2 star rating would be great.
[B] we have two at the note, do i recommend one?
[A] Yes please do and book it for 5 people for 4 nights from Monday.
[B] Ashley Hotel is a great hotel located in the north with free wifi and parking. If that sounds good to you, then I will go ahead and book it?
[A] Yes please.
[B] great! for how many people, which day, and for how long?
[A] 5 people for 4 nights starting from monday.
[B] You are booked for the Ashley Hotel. Your reference number is FX8L2KID . Is there anything else I can assist you with?
[A] I also need to book a taxi to commute between the two places.
[B] Okay, where are you departing from?
[A] Actually I am looking for the Corn Cambridge Exchange first.
[B] The Cambridge Corn Exchange is a theater in the center of the city. It's located at Wheeler Street, would you like their address?
[A] Yes, and I would also like to book a taxi to leave by 07:15.
[B] what is your destination?
[A] Before we move on to the taxi, can I get the address and phone number for the Cambridge corn exchange? And what area is that in?
[B] the phone number is 01223350059.
[A] thank you for your help
[B] I believe you also asked for the address and area. The address is Wheeler Street and it is in the centre. Is there anything else you needed?
[A] that's all i need thanks
[B] Sorry, just to clarify, did you actually not need a taxi after all then?
[A] Sorry, yes please book a taxi. Departing from the Cambridge corn exchange back to the hotel by 7:15. I will be needing the car type and contact number.
[B] A black Lexus will be waiting for you at 7:15 in front, contact number 07495116373. Can I help with anything else?
[A] That is all I need tonight. Thanks!
[B] If you need further assistance, please let us know. It was a pleasure helping you today. Good-bye.

[A] Can you help me find a place to go in the centre?
[B] I can help you with that. Is there a certain kind of attraction that you would like to visit?
[A] Surprise me. Give me the postcode as well.
[B] Would you prefer The Castle Galleries is a museum in the centre of town. Their post code is cb23bj
[A] Great! I'm also looking for a place to eat in the same area. Something not too expensive, but not cheap.
[B] There are 21 places in the centre of town. What type of cuisine would you like?
[A] I am interested in moderately priced international food.
[B] I'd recommend the Varsity Restaurant. Would you like to book a table?
[A] What is the address for your suggested restaurant Varsity?
[B] the varsity restaurant is located at 35 Saint Andrews Street City Centre. Would you like me to book it or more information?
[A] Thanks so much. This sounds like a great restaurant.
[B] Would you like me to book a table, or can I assist you with something else?
[A] Just get me the address, that is all.
[B] 35 Saint Andrews Street, City Centre. Postcode cb23ar.
[A] cool that's all i need thanks
[B] You're welcome, have a great day!

[A] Im looking for a the Kymmoy restaurant in Cambridge
[B] Yes, they are a bit expensive but are located in the city Centre at 52 Mill Road. May I help you with reservation?
[A] Yes i'd like to book a table of 8 at 15:15 on monday
[B] The book for successful, did you need the reservation number?
[A] Yes please. I would also like a train that will depart from bishops stortford and go to cambridge.
[B] Your reservation number is AL0QEU6X . What day would you like to make this trip?
[A] The train should arrive by 08:00 and should be on the same day as the restaurant booking.
[B] The latest train leaves Bishops Stortford at 17:29 and arrives in Cambridge at 18:07. Will this work or would you like an earlier time?
[A] That's too late. I need something that arrives by 8:00, please.
[B] The train departs Bishops Stortford on Monday at 05:29 and arrives at 06:07. Would you like to make a reservation?
[A] No, I am just looking for information. Could you give me the ticket price?
[B] They are 10.10 pounds each, thanks!
[A] Thank you that's all the information I needed, thanks for your help.
[B] Well thank you for contacting the Help Desk, and have a great day!

[A] Hi I am looking for a college to go to in town.
[B] There are 18 different colleges, did you have an area in mind?
[A] Yes, the centre area.
[B] Christ's college is in town centre located at saint andrew's street and has free entrance. Would you like their phone number as well?
[A] Yes, and can you find me an Italian restaurant in the same area?
[B] The address for Christ's College is Saint Andrew's Street and the phone number is 01223334900. There are 9 Italian restaurants in the center. Is there are price range you need?
[A] Yes, I'm looking for something expensive.
[B] There are four in the area. Statizione Restaurant and Coffee Bar, Clowns Cafe, Don Pasquale Pizzeria, and Caffe Uno. Can I make reservations for any of these?
[A] I think I'll try the Caffe Uno. Can I get a table for 5 at 12:15 on Sunday?
[B] I have reserved your table at cafe uno for 5 on Sunday at 12:15. Is there anything else I can help you with?
[A] Yes could I have my booking reference number please?
[B] Sure. Your reference number is D5JM6NE7 .
[A] Thank you very much. That is all I needed. Have a good day.
[B] You're welcome. Goodbye.

[A] Could you help me find a boat to visit on the north side?
[B] I have one in that area. It's called the Riverboat Georgina. It's located at Cambridge Passenger Cruisers, Jubilee House. Would you like their phone number for more information?
[A] Yes, I want the phone number and also the entrance fee, please.
[B] Their phone number is 01223902091 and we do not have the entrance fee in our database at this time.
[A] Okay, that is all I need today. Thank you very much.
[B] You're very welcome! Thanks for contacting the Cambridge TownInfo Centre and have a great day!

[A] I need to take a train from cambridge, I will be leaving after 18:00 on Wednesday.
[B] i have five that leave after 18:00. do you have a specific time in mind?
[A] Yes 18:15 would work I have to get there by 21:00 is that an option?
[B] Yes. I would recommend TR7776 which leaves Cambridge at 18:36 and arrives in Norwich at 19:55.
[A] What is the price and travel time?
[B] The travel time is 79 minutes and the cost is 17.60 pounds, shall I book for you?
[A] No but I do need information on adc theatre.
[B] This is a theatre found at the center of town on Park street.. Their phone number is 01223300085
[A] Excellent. Thanks for your assistance!
[B] Is there any more information that I can get for you or something that you need booked?
[A] No at this time, thank you.
[B] Yeah anytime. I am happy I could help out.
[A] Thank you for your help.
[B] good day to you

[A] Do you know where I can find the Holy Trinity Church?
[B] Absolutely. Holy Trinity Church is on Market Street in the centre of town. Their postcode is cb23nz and is free to enter. Would you need their phone number?
[A] Great what type of attraction are they?
[B] It is an architecture attraction.
